_meta.model: TO graph (anchor-buoy). occurrenceId is the join key into layouts/_index.json. See meta/relationship-audit-model.md.

occurrences.note: Single-record global-storage utility TO. Anchor for SYS | Global Settings [DSK]. Island of one - no relationships yet by design. NOTE: holds gLIST_ value-list keys that reference value lists by name (a stored key, not a relationship); the Value Lists layout edits those assignments.
Value-list registry TO. Anchor for SYS | Value Lists [DSK]. Left rail = found set of this TO; right portal = its ValueListItems.

Members of a value list (sort order, value, status-category mapping, notes). Buoy off ValueLists. Status mapping (fkStatusCategory / StatusCategory) resolves against the canonical VL_StatusCategories members; modeled as a value-list-backed field for now, not a TO edge.
